title: Bitter Crumbly Ukrainian Pork Crumble
description: This quick-fix pork crumble is a keto-friendly, bitter and crumbly dish that can be prepared in under an hour.

ingredients.name: Pork Minced
ingredients.notes: Use low-sodium or unseasoned pork for a healthier option.

ingredients.name: All-Purpose Flour
ingredients.notes: Opt for a keto-friendly flour blend if available.

ingredients.name: Baking Powder
ingredients.notes: Regular baking powder can be used as a substitute if no keto version is available.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste, particularly for those who prefer less salt.

ingredients.name: Optional: Sour Cream or Heavy Cream (Keto)

instructions: Mix the pork, flour, baking powder, salt, and pepper together until well combined.
Form the mixture into small patties or balls. Pat them down lightly if needed for a crumbly texture.
Arrange on a lined baking sheet. Drizzle with optional sour cream or heavy cream evenly over each patty/ball for added richness.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, until golden brown and cooked through (internal temperature reaches 145°F).
Serve hot as a snack or meal accompaniment.
